summary: Frontend testing of Act 2/3 content swap - Act II is now Fire/Reclamation, Act III is now Water/Reflection Chamber. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Login flow works with test@demo.com / password123
Dashboard shows correct act order: Act I=Earth, Act II=Fire/Reclamation, Act III=Water/Reflection Chamber, Act IV=Air
Dashboard sidebar shows correct act order and elements
Dashboard act cards display correct colors: Earth=green, Fire=red, Water=blue, Air=gold
Seeker Echo on dashboard shows fire-themed text for Act II (current act)
Act II protocol page (/protocol/2) loads with Fire/Reclamation content
Act II header shows 'ACT II · FIRE · RECLAMATION'
Act II principle shows 'Reclamation. Burning away what is not essential. Sovereignty.'
Act II 5 steps render correctly: Enter, Burn, Reclaim, Witness, Declare
Act II Step 1 (Enter the Fire): Domain sliders with Fire Audit - Domain Calibration
Act II Step 1: Fire Index metric with contextual readings (metricReadings)
Act II Step 1: Hottest Domain metric with domain-specific readings (domainReadings)
Act II Step 2 (Burn What Is Not Essential): Checklist with Portrait Audit - Mask Inventory
Act II Step 2: Burn Score metric with burnVerdicts
Act II Step 3 (Reclaim Your Power): Pill grid with Retrieval Ledger - Asset Inventory
Act II Step 3: Items in Ledger metric with ledgerPriority ordering
Act II Step 4 (Engage the Seeker): Witness sliders with Witness Test - Sovereignty Calibration
Act II Step 4: Witness Score metric with witnessGaps readings
Act II Step 5 (Declare Sovereignty): Declaration sliders with Declaration Index - Gap Analysis
Act II Step 5: Declaration Gap metric with declReadings and declStatuses
Act II Prometheus agent displayed in agent panel and transmit button
Act III protocol page (/protocol/3) loads with Water/Reflection Chamber content
Act III header shows 'ACT III · WATER · THE REFLECTION CHAMBER'
Act III principle shows 'Reflection. Shadow Work. Looking clearly into the mirror of self.'
Act III 5 steps render correctly: Enter, Face, Document, Witness, Declare
Act III Step 1 (Enter the Mirror): Domain sliders with Mirror Audit - Distortion Calibration
Act III Step 1: Distortion Index metric with contextual readings
Act III Meridian agent displayed in agent panel and transmit button
All sliders are interactive and update metric values
All checkboxes are interactive and update Burn Score
All pill buttons are interactive and update Items in Ledger
Step navigation (5 pips) works - clicking navigates between steps
Textarea for reflection exists and accepts input on all steps
Transmit button shows correct agent name per act (Prometheus for Act II, Meridian for Act III)
Advance button works to proceed to next step
Complete Protocol button appears on Step 5
critical_code_review_comments: actDefinitions.js correctly defines Act 2 as Fire/Reclamation with all 5 steps and detailed metrics (metricReadings, burnVerdicts, ledgerPriority, witnessGaps, declReadings)
actDefinitions.js correctly defines Act 3 as Water/Reflection Chamber with all 5 steps and detailed metrics
Dashboard.js actData array correctly shows element order: Earth → Fire → Water → Air
Dashboard.js seekerEchoes correctly shows fire-themed text for Act 2
ActProtocol.js correctly renders all exercise types with contextual metrics from actDefinitions
AppShell.js sidebar correctly shows act order with proper elements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Act 2 and Act 3 content has been swapped. Act II is now Fire/Reclamation with Prometheus agent and fire-themed metrics (Fire Index, Burn Score, etc.). Act III is now Water/Reflection Chamber with Meridian agent and water-themed metrics (Distortion Index, Shadow Score, etc.). Element order is Earth → Fire → Water → Air. All 5-step protocol engines working with domain_sliders, checklist, pills, witness_sliders, and declaration exercise types.

notes.agents: Act I: Terra, Act II: Prometheus, Act III: Meridian, Act IV: Aether
notes.all_metrics_working: Fire Index, Burn Score, Items in Ledger, Witness Score, Declaration Gap all render with contextual readings
